title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 12: Enkidu's Ghost
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 12 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: A later addition: Enkidu's spirit returns from the underworld to describe the fates of the dead.
introduction: Tablet 12 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: A later addition: Enkidu's spirit returns from the underworld to describe the fates of the dead.

translation.text: Enkidu's spirit rose from the underworld like a gust of wind. They embraced and kissed. Gilgamesh said: 'Tell me, my friend, tell me — what did you see in the underworld?'
